programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: Tony breaks records with the biggest gold haul in Gold Rush history. Parker battles to save his dream washplant, and Todd is finally on the gold after seven weeks at the Buckland.

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programme.sub-title: Spaceship on the Beach, Boogie Bomb and Wyatt Earp's Great Escape
programme.desc: Don Wildman investigates an out-of-this-world object that washed up on a beach, the explosive story of how a WWII bomb ended up buried beneath New York City.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike hopes to capitalise on '80s nostalgia by restoring an original six-cylinder 1982 Toyota Supra with a tired interior, faulty head gasket, compromised exhaust system, and only one working pop-up headlight.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Gas Barbecues, Mattress Pads, and Ear Prostheses
programme.desc: More everyday items are put under the microscope as we discover how gas barbecues are manufactured and mattress pads are produced.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Recycled Skateboards, Braided Pastry, Construction Trailers, and Vises
programme.desc: More everyday items are put under the microscope as we discover how skateboards are manufactured and braided pastry is produced.

programme.title: Drive Safer
programme.desc: In the final episode, the focus is on safety when purchasing your next vehicle, with insights on people movers and a recap test to assess the progress made in road safety knowledge and driving skills.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Drew Pritchard travels the length and breadth of the country in search of elusive gems and other magnificent objects.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Lifestyle brand Salt Life needs Wayde and Brett's help again. This time they want an aquarium even bigger and better than the original.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike hopes to capitalise on '80s nostalgia by restoring an original six-cylinder 1982 Toyota Supra with a tired interior, faulty head gasket, compromised exhaust system, and only one working pop-up headlight.

programme.title: Opal Hunters: Red Dirt Road Trip
programme.desc: Only a week is left before JC has to return home for the birth of his first child and in a final sprint to reach their new $20,000 target, Rod has jammed as many money-making schemes as possible into 7 days.

programme.title: The Grand Tour
programme.desc: Jeremy, Richard and James are told to take a holiday across the Southwestern United States in an RV. They stage a mutiny to get rid of the assigned ride and drive an RV of their making.

programme.title: Bush Wreck Rescue
programme.desc: Glen and Robin agree to a build-off competition, while Bill purchases a vintage Cadillac that appears to be in mint condition until he starts scraping off the paint.

programme.title: Drive Safer
programme.desc: In the final episode, the focus is on safety when purchasing your next vehicle, with insights on people movers and a recap test to assess the progress made in road safety knowledge and driving skills.

programme.title: Opal Hunters: Red Dirt Road Trip
programme.desc: Only a week is left before JC has to return home for the birth of his first child and in a final sprint to reach their new $20,000 target, Rod has jammed as many money-making schemes as possible into 7 days.

programme.title: The Grand Tour
programme.desc: Jeremy, Richard and James are told to take a holiday across the Southwestern United States in an RV. They stage a mutiny to get rid of the assigned ride and drive an RV of their making.

programme.title: Bush Wreck Rescue
programme.desc: Glen and Robin agree to a build-off competition, while Bill purchases a vintage Cadillac that appears to be in mint condition until he starts scraping off the paint.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Gas Barbecues, Mattress Pads, and Ear Prostheses
programme.desc: More everyday items are put under the microscope as we discover how gas barbecues are manufactured and mattress pads are produced.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Recycled Skateboards, Braided Pastry, Construction Trailers, and Vises
programme.desc: More everyday items are put under the microscope as we discover how skateboards are manufactured and braided pastry is produced.

programme.title: Drive Safer
programme.desc: In the final episode, the focus is on safety when purchasing your next vehicle, with insights on people movers and a recap test to assess the progress made in road safety knowledge and driving skills.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Lifestyle brand Salt Life needs Wayde and Brett's help again. This time they want an aquarium even bigger and better than the original.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Drew Pritchard travels the length and breadth of the country in search of elusive gems and other magnificent objects.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Plasma Gems, Special Effects Snow, and Piano Restoration
programme.desc: More everyday items are put under the microscope, with a look at how plasma gems are manufactured and how special effects snow is made.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: 3-Wheel Electric Bikes, Skin Cream, Patio Heaters, and Wood-Spoke Wheels
programme.desc: More everyday items are put under the microscope as we discover how three-wheel electric bikes are manufactured and skin cream is made.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike dives into the expanding market for second-generation muscle cars by snatching up a 1973 Ford Mustang Mach 1, which has lost some power over the years.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Ethel M Chocolates Factory is gearing up for their annual Holiday Cactus Lighting event and have tasked Wayde and Brett with building the ultimate holiday tank.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.sub-title: Lost City of the White Jaguar
programme.desc: In narco-controlled jungles, Josh hunts a legendary Mayan stronghold.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Drew Pritchard travels the length and breadth of the country in search of elusive gems and other magnificent objects.

programme.title: Bush Wreck Rescue
programme.desc: Glen and Robin agree to a build-off competition, while Bill purchases a vintage Cadillac that appears to be in mint condition until he starts scraping off the paint.

programme.title: Opal Hunters: Red Dirt Road Trip
programme.desc: Only a week is left before JC has to return home for the birth of his first child and in a final sprint to reach their new $20,000 target, Rod has jammed as many money-making schemes as possible into 7 days.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike dives into the expanding market for second-generation muscle cars by snatching up a 1973 Ford Mustang Mach 1, which has lost some power over the years.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Plasma Gems, Special Effects Snow, and Piano Restoration
programme.desc: More everyday items are put under the microscope, with a look at how plasma gems are manufactured and how special effects snow is made.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: 3-Wheel Electric Bikes, Skin Cream, Patio Heaters, and Wood-Spoke Wheels
programme.desc: More everyday items are put under the microscope as we discover how three-wheel electric bikes are manufactured and skin cream is made.

programme.title: Drive Review
programme.sub-title: Ferrari Purosangue, Ford's F-150 heavyweight ute, Audi Q4 e-tron
programme.desc: The team review the Ferrari Purosangue, Ford's F-150 heavyweight ute and the Audi Q4 e-tron.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Drew Pritchard travels the length and breadth of the country in search of elusive gems and other magnificent objects.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Ethel M Chocolates Factory is gearing up for their annual Holiday Cactus Lighting event and have tasked Wayde and Brett with building the ultimate holiday tank.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike dives into the expanding market for second-generation muscle cars by snatching up a 1973 Ford Mustang Mach 1, which has lost some power over the years.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There: Bermuda Triangle Edition
programme.desc: Tony Harris hits the Florida coast to hunt the Bermuda beast and other sea monsters. Alongside experts, he weighs global evidence to see if these creatures are fact or fiction.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Hot on the trail of a massive stolen fortune, Josh chases the treasure of the Spanish pirate Amaro Pargo. Hunt of Pargo's stomping grounds in the Canary Islands leads Josh beneath an active volcano.

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programme.sub-title: Serial Mourner, Glacier Inferno and Desert Giants
programme.desc: Don Wildman investigates a mysterious family curse that terrified a small town, a father and son's desperate attempt to escape an out-of-control inferno.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: On their second night of investigation in the remote mining town of Clifton, Arizona the team revisits several hubs of paranormal activity as they try to get to the bottom of the aggressive phenomena.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There: Bermuda Triangle Edition
programme.desc: Tony Harris hits the Florida coast to hunt the Bermuda beast and other sea monsters. Alongside experts, he weighs global evidence to see if these creatures are fact or fiction.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Hot on the trail of a massive stolen fortune, Josh chases the treasure of the Spanish pirate Amaro Pargo. Hunt of Pargo's stomping grounds in the Canary Islands leads Josh beneath an active volcano.

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programme.sub-title: Serial Mourner, Glacier Inferno and Desert Giants
programme.desc: Don Wildman investigates a mysterious family curse that terrified a small town, a father and son's desperate attempt to escape an out-of-control inferno.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike dives into the expanding market for second-generation muscle cars by snatching up a 1973 Ford Mustang Mach 1, which has lost some power over the years.

programme.sub-title: Plasma Gems, Special Effects Snow, and Piano Restoration
programme.desc: More everyday items are put under the microscope, with a look at how plasma gems are manufactured and how special effects snow is made.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: 3-Wheel Electric Bikes, Skin Cream, Patio Heaters, and Wood-Spoke Wheels
programme.desc: More everyday items are put under the microscope as we discover how three-wheel electric bikes are manufactured and skin cream is made.

programme.title: Drive Review
programme.sub-title: Ferrari Purosangue, Fords 150 heavy weight Ute, Audi Q4 eTron
programme.desc: The team review the Ferrari Purosangue, Ford's F-150 heavyweight ute and the Audi Q4 e-tron.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Ethel M Chocolates Factory is gearing up for their annual Holiday Cactus Lighting event and have tasked Wayde and Brett with building the ultimate holiday tank.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Drew Pritchard travels the length and breadth of the country in search of elusive gems and other magnificent objects.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Wild West Holsters, Water Video Housings, Soy Drinks, and Pet Nail Trimmers
programme.desc: More everyday items are put under the microscope as we discover how wild west holsters are manufactured and water video housings are made.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Wood Garage Doors, Sand and Salt Spreaders, and Animatronic Dinosaurs
programme.desc: More everyday items are put under the microscope as we discover how wood garage doors are manufactured and animatronic dinosaurs are made.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike and Ant work to restore a rusty, non-driving 1973 Saab 96 to its past glory, then hope their effort will pass muster with one of the car world's most passionate fan bases.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.sub-title: Tracy Morgan's Giant Shark Tank Under Construction
programme.desc: Tracy Morgan has the biggest idea of all. He wants to swim with his massive 1.8m sharks, so he wants the guys to tank his entire pool house.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: Form matches function as Bill and his team customize a 2023 Dodge Ram truck so that it can win awards while still performing like a truck.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Drew Pritchard travels the length and breadth of the country in search of elusive gems and other magnificent objects.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There: Bermuda Triangle Edition
programme.desc: Tony Harris hits the Florida coast to hunt the Bermuda beast and other sea monsters. Alongside experts, he weighs global evidence to see if these creatures are fact or fiction.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Hot on the trail of a massive stolen fortune, Josh chases the treasure of the Spanish pirate Amaro Pargo. Hunt of Pargo's stomping grounds in the Canary Islands leads Josh beneath an active volcano.
